data.body: CHECKPOINT: All 3 SKILL.md files (fix-bug, debug-everything, sprint) have already been updated — no hardcoded 'batches of 5' remains in any SKILL.md. The only remaining matches for 'batches of 5' / '5 sub-agents' are in eval promptfooconfig.yaml files (fix-bug, sprint, debug-everything), which are TDD test assertions that verify the OLD text is absent from the SKILL.md. These test strings must remain as-is — they are negative assertions, not rule citations. One stale RED-state comment in fix-bug eval needs updating (claims SKILL.md still hardcodes batches of 5, but it no longer does).
